Quiet Luxury, Made for Real Life Velmora was born from a simple belief: fine jewelry should feel
            attainable. Each piece is cast in 18k gold-plated brass and finished
            by hand, balancing timeless silhouettes with the kind of durability
            you can wear from morning coffee to midnight toasts. gold jewelry hands artisan making
